/usr/bin/ar qc libwg_radius_domain.a CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/config/config_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/domain/peer_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/domain/session_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/application/async_auth_command_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/application/auth_command_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/application/profile_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/application/command_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/radius/radcli_radius_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/application/wg_polling_coordinator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/application/wg_event_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/shaping/noop_traffic_shaper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/wireguard/netlink_peer_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/wireguard/netlink_wireguard_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain.dir/src/wireguard/wg_snapshot.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libwg_radius_domain.a
